title: musical-organogram-represents
prompt: Design a device that converts the dance of subatomic particles...
answer: This organogram represents a simple musical instrument with an acoustical shape (circle) and an interface (rectangle). The acoustical shape is symbolized by a circle, while the interface is represented by a rectangle.
summary: This organogram represents a simple musical instrument with an acoustical shape (circle) and an interface (rectangle). The acoustical shape is symbolized by a circle, while the interface is represented by a rectangle.
materials_text:
**Materials**

1. 1 cylindrical stainless steel vacuum chamber, 40 cm diameter, 60 cm length
2. 4 superconducting niobium coils, 15 cm diameter
3
code:
```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
plt.style.use('dark_background')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_color('black')
ax.spines['bottom'].set_color('black')
ax.grid(True, color='grey', alpha=0.3)

# Acoustical Shape (Circle)
circle = plt.Circle((4, 2), 1, fill=False, edgecolor='orange', linewidth=2.5)
ax.add_patch(circle)

# Interface (Rectangle)
rectangle = plt.Rectangle((6, 1), 2, 1, fill=False, edgecolor='blue', linewidth=2.5)
ax.add_patch(rectangle)

plt.show()
```
plot_code:
```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
plt.style.use('dark_background')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_color('black')
ax.spines['bottom'].set_color('black')
ax.grid(True, color='grey', alpha=0.3)

# Acoustical Shape (Circle)
circle = plt.Circle((4, 2), 1, fill=False, edgecolor='orange', linewidth=2.5)
ax.add_patch(circle)

# Interface (Rectangle)
rectangle = plt.Rectangle((6, 1), 2, 1, fill=False, edgecolor='blue', linewidth=2.5)
ax.add_patch(rectangle)

plt.show()
```
stl_code:
import numpy as np
import trimesh

# map: air-column -> cylinder, bell radiation -> cone, mouthpiece interface -> cylinder
body = trimesh.creation.cylinder(radius=18.87, height=295.66, sections=29)
bell = trimesh.creation.cone(radius=27.12, height=74.46, sections=29)
bell.apply_translation((0, 0, -185.06))
mouth = trimesh.creation.cylinder(radius=9.55, height=46.81, sections=29)
mouth.apply_translation((0, 0, 171.24))
spine = trimesh.creation.box(extents=(15.1, 20.76, 118.26))
mesh = trimesh.util.concatenate([body, bell, mouth, spine])
